f2152f3a-ae32-4773-a4ab-4a4eccd8d11d.content: i need select all column in biller
i need max transactions last month

SELECT
    COUNT(Id)
FROM
    FinanceTransaction
WHERE
    CreationTime >= DATEADD(month, DATEDIFF(month, 0, GETDATE()) - 1, 0)
    AND CreationTime < DATEADD(month, DATEDIFF(month, 0, GETDATE()), 0)
